headline: Q1 Earnings Highs And Lows: STERIS (NYSE:STE) Vs The Rest Of The Surgical Equipment & Consumables - Diversified Stocks
summary: Quarterly earnings results are a good time to check in on a company’s progress, especially compared to its peers in the same sector. Today we are looking at STERIS (NYSE:STE) and the best and worst performers in the surgical equipment & consumables - diversified industry.
